title: West Feliciana Parish School Board; levy authorized
doc_html:
§338.79.  West Feliciana Parish School Board; levy authorized

The West Feliciana Parish School Board is hereby authorized to levy and collect a sales tax of one per cent as hereinafter set forth.

Acts 1962, No. 276, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 33:2735.1 pursuant to Acts 2011, No. 248, §4.
